sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HSBC's Mark Tucker to return to AIA; interim replacement is Brendan Nelson
feed.summary: HSBC Holdings chairman Mark Tucker will return to insurer AIA Group on October 1 and be replaced on an interim basis by veteran accountant Brendan Nelson, the two companies said on Friday. In early May, Tucker, who will turn 68 in December, said he would retire from HSBC by the end of the year.
